articles.title: RedoTAVR coronary obstruction risk in small annuli: A post-TAVR CT study.
articles.authors: Liccardo G, Skalidis I, Esposito L, Amabile N, Benamer H et al.
articles.key_finding: RESULTS: In small annuli, SEVs were associated with increased predicted CO risk after redoTAVR compared to BEVs, considering risk plane at node 6 (OR ​= ​15.52, p ​< ​0.001) or node 5 (OR ​= ​3.13, p ​= ​0.03), while not at node 4.

articles.title: Large Annulus Equals Poor Outcomes in TMVR: Are We Seeing These Patients Too Late?
